description:
You are a support-engineer who has been asked to gather a **very small, deterministic diagnostic bundle** inside the current user’s home directory.  
Create exactly the following artefacts and nothing else:

1. Directory  
   • Path: **/home/user/diag_collect**  
   • Permissions: `750` (rwx for owner, rx for group, none for others).

2. README file  
   • Path: **/home/user/diag_collect/README.md**  
   • Permissions: `640`  
   • Exact content (2 lines, include the final newline after each line):  
     ```
     This directory contains minimally scoped diagnostics.
     Created by the support-engineer automation task.
     ```

3. System information log  
   • Path: **/home/user/diag_collect/system_info.log**  
   • Permissions: `640`  
   • Exact content (2 lines, include the final newline after each line, no extra blank lines):  
     ```
     SUPPORT_DIAG_TOOL
     UTC_TIMESTAMP: 2022-01-01T00:00:00Z
     ```

4. Collection summary log  
   • Path: **/home/user/diag_collect/collection.log**  
   • Permissions: `640`  
   • Exact content (three lines, include the final newline after each line, and **use octal notation** exactly as shown):  
     ```
     /home/user/diag_collect 750
     /home/user/diag_collect/README.md 640
     /home/user/diag_collect/system_info.log 640
     ```

Hints to accomplish the job (do **not** output these hints as part of your solution):  
• A total of about 3-4 shell commands is sufficient (e.g., `mkdir`, `chmod`, `echo`/`printf`, and redirection).  
• Make sure you adjust permissions after the files/directories exist, otherwise the automated test will fail.  
• Ensure no extra files, hidden files, or lines are created inside **/home/user/diag_collect**.

The automated test will verify:
• Existence and permissions of the directory and each file.  
• The content of every file matches **exactly** (including newlines and spelling).  
• Only the three specified files are present inside **/home/user/diag_collect**.
truth:

   - Contains exactly the three files listed below, no others.

2. /home/user/diag_collect/README.md

   - Contents (including terminating newline):
     Line1: "This directory contains minimally scoped diagnostics.\n"
     Line2: "Created by the support-engineer automation task.\n"

3. /home/user/diag_collect/system_info.log
   - Mode: 640
   - Size: 55 bytes
   - Contents (including terminating newline):
     Line1: "SUPPORT_DIAG_TOOL\n"
     Line2: "UTC_TIMESTAMP: 2022-01-01T00:00:00Z\n"

4. /home/user/diag_collect/collection.log

   - Size: 119 bytes

     Line2: "/home/user/diag_collect/README.md 640\n"
     Line3: "/home/user/diag_collect/system_info.log 640\n"
